message:
Add toolchain synchronization testing support

Mock SSH Toolchain Simulation:
- Add fail_toolchain_install flag to MockConfig for simulating rustup
  toolchain installation failures
- Add no_rustup flag to simulate workers without rustup available
- Add environment variable hooks: RCH_MOCK_TOOLCHAIN_INSTALL_FAIL,
  RCH_MOCK_NO_RUSTUP
- Add helper constructors: MockConfig::toolchain_install_failure(),
  MockConfig::no_rustup()
- MockSshClient.execute() now intercepts rustup commands and returns
  appropriate error responses based on mock flags

E2E Test Toolchain Scenarios:
- Add --fail toolchain-install mode: simulates rustup install failure,
  expects graceful fallback to local execution (allow decision)
- Add --fail no-rustup mode: simulates worker without rustup, expects
  graceful fallback (allow decision)
- Add hook_json_with_toolchain() helper for toolchain-specific tests
- Add check_toolchain_failure_logged() and check_no_rustup_logged()
  validation functions
- Update --run-all to include toolchain scenarios after standard tests

These tests verify the fail-open philosophy: when toolchain sync fails,
the hook should allow local execution rather than blocking the agent.
This ensures compilation continues even when remote workers have
toolchain issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
